hero.name: Sebastián Huertas
hero.description: Computer Science Engineer passionate about building scalable software systems and intelligent solutions. I enjoy solving complex problems through clean, efficient, and well-structured code, continuously learning and applying modern technologies to develop high-impact, production-ready applications.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I am a final-year Computer Science Engineering student at Universidad del Valle de Guatemala with hands-on experience in software development and a strong focus on scalable web applications and artificial intelligence. I have worked with technologies such as React, TypeScript, Next.js, Ruby on Rails, and both relational and non-relational databases, contributing to full-stack solutions and AI-driven systems that create real-world impact.

items.role: Full Stack Developer specialized in AI
items.description: Develop scalable web applications using Next.js and TypeScript, translating Figma designs into production-ready interfaces. Implement RAG pipelines integrating Qdrant and Gemini to enhance AI agents' contextual understanding. Design and orchestrate AI agents using OpenRouter, GPT, and Grok, optimize workflows with n8n, and manage structured content through Strapi CMS.

Develop full-stack solutions using React, TypeScript, and Ruby on Rails. Manage MongoDB and MySQL databases ensuring performance and data consistency. Integrate secure payment gateways with Recurrente and identity verification systems with Didit. Contributed to the development of a job-matching platform and inventory management modules with barcode scanning.

Developed and maintained a medical anamnesis system using Laravel and PHP for frontend, backend, and REST APIs. Resolved frontend issues and optimized system workflows. Gained hands-on experience in basic Linux server administration and application deployment.

Developed secure backend systems using Laravel and relational databases. Implemented role-based access control (RBAC) for medical forms to ensure compliance and data security. Maintained static pages and resolved production issues, improving platform stability and user experience.

Final-year student with a GPA above 90%. Focused on Software Engineering, Algorithms, Databases, Web Technologies, and Artificial Intelligence. Developed academic and practical projects using React, Node.js, TypeScript, and modern software architectures.
